name: 21_a_met_b_miss
description: Branch 3 / Interaction: System A condition met (increments + may break); System B fails (resets). Independence test 1.
derivation: Outer pass, gate pass. System A: safe_hwm 4.0 >= cross 2.0 AND current_return 1.0 < safe_hwm 4.0 -> MET. new_vwap_ticks = 2+1 = 3; broken TRUE. System B: current_return 1.0 <= bleed_arm -1.0 FALSE -> bleed_ticks reset to 0 (lost the 2). bleed_broken False. Returns (3, 0, True, False). Independence: System B's prev count 2 was wiped DESPITE System A breaking.
